requirement_topic.en: BPC Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: BPC并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: BPC併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數

summary.en: BPC (Botswana Power Corporation) is the national transmission and distribution utility and the grid-connection authority for solar PV systems in Botswana. BPC's network access and connection conditions for distributed and utility-scale PV require inverters to comply with IEC-referenced grid interconnection standards applicable to Botswana's 50 Hz, 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase grid (consistent with IEC 60038 standard voltages). Key grid-connection requirements include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect within the standard-specified time; (2) IEC 61727 (Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface) compliance for utility interface requirements; (3) protection relay settings and reconnection delays validated for Botswana's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. BERA (Botswana Energy Regulatory Authority) additionally requires a generation licence or small-scale embedded generation exemption before any grid-tied PV system can operate. Inverter firmware and protection settings must be validated against Botswana BPC grid parameters — not the 220/380 V settings used in China under GB/T 156. Note: Botswana does not have a BPC-published public technical specification document equivalent to Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1 in the open literature as of 2026-06-14; exporters must confirm current BPC connection requirements directly with BPC and BERA.
summary.zh: BPC（博茨瓦纳电力公司）是博茨瓦纳国家输配电公用事业单位及太阳能光伏系统的并网主管机构。BPC针对分布式和大型光伏系统的电网接入及并网条件要求逆变器符合适用于博茨瓦纳50 Hz、单相230 V / 三相400 V电网（符合IEC 60038标准电压）的IEC并网互联标准。主要并网要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛测试——逆变器须在标准规定时间内检测电网失电并断开；（2）符合IEC 61727（光伏系统——电力接口特性）的电力接口要求；（3）针对博茨瓦纳230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证的保护继电器整定和重连延迟。BERA（博茨瓦纳能源监管局）还要求任何并网光伏系统在运营前取得发电许可或小规模嵌入式发电豁免。逆变器固件和保护整定须针对博茨瓦纳BPC电网参数进行验证，而非中国依据GB/T 156使用的220/380 V参数。注意：截至2026年6月14日，博茨瓦纳尚无BPC公开发布的相当于Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1的公开技术规格文件；出口商须直接向BPC和BERA确认现行连接要求。
summary.zht: BPC（波札那電力公司）是波札那國家輸配電公用事業單位及太陽能光伏系統的併網主管機構。BPC針對分散式和大型光伏系統的電網接入及併網條件要求逆變器符合適用於波札那50 Hz、單相230 V / 三相400 V電網（符合IEC 60038標準電壓）的IEC併網互聯標準。主要併網要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島測試——逆變器須在標準規定時間內偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）符合IEC 61727（光伏系統——電力介面特性）的電力介面要求；（3）針對波札那230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證的保護繼電器整定和重連延遲。BERA（波札那能源監管局）還要求任何併網光伏系統在運營前取得發電許可或小規模嵌入式發電豁免。逆變器韌體和保護整定須針對波札那BPC電網參數進行驗證，而非中國依據GB/T 156使用的220/380 V參數。注意：截至2026年6月14日，波札那尚無BPC公開發布的相當於Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1的公開技術規格文件；出口商須直接向BPC和BERA確認現行連接要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 60038 — IEC standard voltages (underpins Botswana 230/400 V grid nominal voltages)
BERA Act (Cap. 74:04) — Botswana Energy Regulatory Authority Act governing generation licences and technical conditions for grid-tied PV
BPC network access and connection conditions — to be confirmed directly with BPC (bpc.bw)

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results under Chinese grid conditions. These documents are not accepted as BPC Botswana grid-connection evidence. The key parameter difference is voltage: China's grid standard is 220/380 V at 50 Hz under GB/T 156, whereas Botswana BPC operates at 230/400 V at 50 Hz (aligned with IEC 60038). Inverter firmware protection thresholds validated for Chinese grid conditions must be re-parameterised and retested for Botswana BPC grid conditions. Additionally, China's domestic anti-islanding test results may not be performed against IEC 62116 — IEC 62116 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is required.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）及中国电网条件下的国内防孤岛测试结果。上述文件不被BPC博茨瓦纳并网接受。主要参数差异在于电压：中国电网标准依据GB/T 156为220/380 V 50 Hz，而博茨瓦纳BPC按IEC 60038运行于230/400 V 50 Hz。针对中国电网条件验证的逆变器固件保护阈值须重新针对博茨瓦纳BPC电网条件设置参数并重新测试。此外，中国国内防孤岛测试结果可能非针对IEC 62116进行——需要来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116测试证据。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）及中國電網條件下的國內防孤島測試結果。上述文件不被BPC波札那併網接受。主要參數差異在於電壓：中國電網標準依據GB/T 156為220/380 V 50 Hz，而波札那BPC按IEC 60038運行於230/400 V 50 Hz。針對中國電網條件驗證的逆變器韌體保護閾值須重新針對波札那BPC電網條件設置參數並重新測試。此外，中國國內防孤島測試結果可能非針對IEC 62116進行——需要來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy BPC Botswana network access requirements. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 utility interface compliance evidence; (c) firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays validated for Botswana's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V Chinese grid parameters. Where inverter firmware settings differ from factory defaults for China, re-parameterisation must be documented and, if the change is material, re-tested under the applicable IEC standard. BERA generation licence or small-scale exemption must also be obtained before grid-tied operation; the project developer typically holds this licence, but equipment must satisfy BERA's technical conditions. Confirm all current BPC connection requirements and BERA technical conditions directly with BPC (bpc.bw) and BERA (bera.co.bw) before finalising the equipment compliance package.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足BPC博茨瓦纳电网接入要求。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC 61727电力接口合规证据；（c）针对博茨瓦纳230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证的固件保护阈值和重连延迟——而非中国220/380 V电网参数。若逆变器固件设置与中国出厂默认设置不同，须记录重新参数化过程，如变更重要，应依据适用IEC标准重新测试。并网运营前还须取得BERA发电许可或小规模豁免；项目开发商通常持有此许可，但设备须满足BERA技术条件。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向BPC（bpc.bw）和BERA（bera.co.bw）确认所有现行BPC连接要求和BERA技术条件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足BPC波札那電網接入要求。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC 61727電力介面合規證據；（c）針對波札那230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證的韌體保護閾值和重連延遲——而非中國220/380 V電網參數。若逆變器韌體設置與中國出廠預設設置不同，須記錄重新參數化過程，如變更重要，應依據適用IEC標準重新測試。併網運營前還須取得BERA發電許可或小規模豁免；項目開發商通常持有此許可，但設備須滿足BERA技術條件。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向BPC（bpc.bw）和BERA（bera.co.bw）確認所有現行BPC連接要求和BERA技術條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection under BPC network access conditions; BERA licensing is a separate mandatory gate for the generating entity. Specific technical requirements should be confirmed directly with BPC and BERA.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but does not transfer to BPC Botswana grid-connection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BPC grid-connection conditions require IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility interface evidence — not covered by Chinese GB/T grid certificates. Re-parameterise inverter firmware for Botswana's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid before testing and document the configuration. Obtain BERA generation licence or small-scale embedded generation exemption through the project developer. Verify current BPC connection requirements and BERA technical conditions directly with BPC (bpc.bw) and BERA (bera.co.bw) before finalising the equipment compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] BPC并网条件要求IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727电力接口证据——上述均未被中国GB/T并网证书覆盖。测试前须将逆变器固件重新参数化为博茨瓦纳230/400 V 50 Hz电网参数，并记录配置。通过项目开发商取得BERA发电许可或小规模嵌入式发电豁免。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向BPC（bpc.bw）和BERA（bera.co.bw）核实现行BPC连接要求和BERA技术条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] BPC併網條件要求IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727電力介面證據——上述均未被中國GB/T併網證書覆蓋。測試前須將逆變器韌體重新參數化為波札那230/400 V 50 Hz電網參數，並記錄配置。通過項目開發商取得BERA發電許可或小規模嵌入式發電豁免。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向BPC（bpc.bw）和BERA（bera.co.bw）核實現行BPC連接要求和BERA技術條件。

requirement_topic.en: BERA Licensing and BOBS Conformity — Grid-Tied Solar PV Generation Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BERA许可与BOBS合格评定——并网太阳能光伏发电要求
requirement_topic.zht: BERA許可與BOBS合格評定——併網太陽能光伏發電要求

summary.en: BERA (Botswana Energy Regulatory Authority), established under the Botswana Energy Regulatory Authority Act (Cap. 74:04), is the statutory regulator for electricity generation, transmission, distribution, and supply in Botswana. Any grid-tied solar PV generation facility requires either a BERA generation licence or a qualifying exemption (e.g. small-scale embedded generation below a threshold capacity). BERA sets the technical conditions that generating equipment — including inverters — must meet to connect to the BPC grid. BOBS (Botswana Bureau of Standards), established under the Standards Act (Cap. 74:01), publishes Botswana Standards (BOS) which largely adopt IEC standards. Where BOBS has declared a product category subject to mandatory conformity assessment, suppliers must demonstrate compliance. As of 2026-06-14, the precise scope of mandatory BOBS conformity assessment for solar PV inverters should be confirmed directly with BOBS (bobstandards.bw). Botswana has excellent solar irradiation (the Kalahari and Ghanzi regions average over 6 kWh/m²/day) and is expanding utility-scale and distributed PV (including projects at Jwaneng and Mmadinare) alongside a net-billing scheme for distributed solar. This creates growing demand for imported solar inverters that can satisfy both BERA and BPC technical requirements.
summary.zh: BERA（博茨瓦纳能源监管局），依据博茨瓦纳能源监管局法令（第74:04章）设立，是博茨瓦纳负责电力发电、输电、配电和供电的法定监管机构。任何并网太阳能光伏发电设施须取得BERA发电许可或符合条件的豁免（例如低于特定装机容量的小规模嵌入式发电）。BERA规定发电设备（包括逆变器）接入BPC电网须满足的技术条件。BOBS（博茨瓦纳标准局），依据标准法（第74:01章）设立，发布博茨瓦纳标准（BOS），主要采纳IEC标准。BOBS将某产品类别列为强制性合格评定范围时，供应商须证明合规。截至2026年6月14日，BOBS对太阳能光伏逆变器强制性合格评定的具体范围应直接向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）确认。博茨瓦纳拥有优异的太阳能辐照资源（卡拉哈里和甘兹地区日均辐照量超过6 kWh/m²），正在扩大大型和分布式光伏装机（包括Jwaneng和Mmadinare项目），并推行分布式太阳能净计量方案。这为能够满足BERA和BPC技术要求的进口太阳能逆变器创造了日益增长的需求。
summary.zht: BERA（波札那能源監管局），依據波札那能源監管局法令（第74:04章）設立，是波札那負責電力發電、輸電、配電和供電的法定監管機構。任何併網太陽能光伏發電設施須取得BERA發電許可或符合條件的豁免（例如低於特定裝機容量的小規模嵌入式發電）。BERA規定發電設備（包括逆變器）接入BPC電網須滿足的技術條件。BOBS（波札那標準局），依據標準法（第74:01章）設立，發布波札那標準（BOS），主要採納IEC標準。BOBS將某產品類別列為強制性合格評定範圍時，供應商須證明合規。截至2026年6月14日，BOBS對太陽能光伏逆變器強制性合格評定的具體範圍應直接向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）確認。波札那擁有優異的太陽能輻照資源（卡拉哈里和甘齊地區日均輻照量超過6 kWh/m²），正在擴大大型和分散式光伏裝機（包括Jwaneng和Mmadinare項目），並推行分散式太陽能淨計量方案。這為能夠滿足BERA和BPC技術要求的進口太陽能逆變器創造了日益增長的需求。

standards_or_laws: Botswana Energy Regulatory Authority Act (Cap. 74:04) — establishes BERA and its licensing powers
Standards Act (Cap. 74:01) — establishes BOBS and Botswana Standards (BOS) framework
IEC 62109-1/-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems (adopted or referenced as BOS / IEC)
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to BERA licensing. Distributed and utility-scale solar PV in China is governed by National Energy Administration (NEA) policies and grid operator (State Grid, Southern Power Grid) connection rules, with equipment assessed against domestic standards (NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964-2024). Chinese product certification bodies (CQC, CGC) issue voluntary safety certificates against GB/T 37408. Neither BERA licensing nor BOBS conformity assessment is satisfied by Chinese domestic NEA approvals or CQC/CGC certificates. These must be obtained separately for the Botswana market.
summary.zh: 中国没有与BERA许可直接对应的制度。中国分布式和大型光伏发电受国家能源局（NEA）政策及电网运营商（国家电网、南方电网）并网规则管理，设备依据国内标准（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）进行评估。中国产品认证机构（CQC、CGC）依据GB/T 37408颁发自愿性安全证书。中国国内NEA审批或CQC/CGC证书均不满足BERA许可或BOBS合格评定要求，须为博茨瓦纳市场单独获取。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與BERA許可直接對應的制度。中國分散式和大型光伏發電受國家能源局（NEA）政策及電網運營商（國家電網、南方電網）併網規則管理，設備依據國內標準（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）進行評估。中國產品認證機構（CQC、CGC）依據GB/T 37408頒發自願性安全證書。中國國內NEA審批或CQC/CGC證書均不滿足BERA許可或BOBS合格評定要求，須為波札那市場單獨取得。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: BERA licensing (or qualifying exemption) is a mandatory gate for any grid-tied solar PV generation facility in Botswana, separate from equipment compliance. BOBS conformity assessment may apply to solar PV inverters depending on whether the product category falls within the mandatory scheme — confirm with BOBS (bobstandards.bw). Chinese domestic NEA approvals and CQC/CGC product certificates do not satisfy BERA licensing conditions or BOBS mandatory conformity requirements. Equipment must demonstrate compliance with applicable IEC standards (IEC 62109-1/-2 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility interface, IEC 62920 EMC) as referenced by BOBS and BERA. Confirm current BERA licensing thresholds, BOBS mandatory product scope, and any applicable fees and lead times directly with the relevant authorities before committing product to Botswana projects.
gap.zh: 差距：BERA许可（或符合条件的豁免）是博茨瓦纳任何并网太阳能光伏发电设施的强制性门槛，独立于设备合规。BOBS合格评定可能适用于太阳能光伏逆变器，取决于该产品类别是否属于强制性方案范围——请向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）确认。中国国内NEA审批和CQC/CGC产品证书不满足BERA许可条件或BOBS强制性合规要求。设备须证明符合BOBS和BERA参照的适用IEC标准（IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727电力接口、IEC 62920 EMC）。在将产品用于博茨瓦纳项目前，请直接向相关机构确认现行BERA许可门槛、BOBS强制性产品范围及任何适用费用和前置时间。
gap.zht: 差距：BERA許可（或符合條件的豁免）是波札那任何併網太陽能光伏發電設施的強制性門檻，獨立於設備合規。BOBS合格評定可能適用於太陽能光伏逆變器，取決於該產品類別是否屬於強制性方案範圍——請向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）確認。中國國內NEA審批和CQC/CGC產品證書不滿足BERA許可條件或BOBS強制性合規要求。設備須證明符合BOBS和BERA參照的適用IEC標準（IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727電力介面、IEC 62920 EMC）。在將產品用於波札那項目前，請直接向相關機構確認現行BERA許可門檻、BOBS強制性產品範圍及任何適用費用和前置時間。

mandatory_status.target: BERA generation licence or exemption: Mandatory for the generating entity before any grid-tied operation. BOBS conformity assessment: Mandatory for product categories within the declared mandatory scheme — scope to be confirmed with BOBS.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese NEA approvals and CQC/CGC product certificates are issued under China domestic regulatory frameworks — not transferable to Botswana BERA or BOBS requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BERA licensing is a mandatory gate for any grid-tied PV generation facility in Botswana — separate from and in addition to equipment IEC compliance. BOBS conformity assessment scope for solar PV inverters must be confirmed directly with BOBS (bobstandards.bw). Chinese domestic approvals do not transfer to Botswana. Verify current BERA licensing thresholds, fees, and technical conditions at bera.co.bw, and BOBS mandatory product scope at bobstandards.bw, before committing product to any Botswana PV project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] BERA许可是博茨瓦纳任何并网光伏发电设施的强制性门槛——独立于且额外于设备IEC合规要求。太阳能光伏逆变器的BOBS合格评定范围须直接向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）确认。中国国内审批不能转移至博茨瓦纳。在将产品用于任何博茨瓦纳光伏项目前，请在bera.co.bw核实现行BERA许可门槛、费用和技术条件，并在bobstandards.bw核实BOBS强制性产品范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] BERA許可是波札那任何併網光伏發電設施的強制性門檻——獨立於且額外於設備IEC合規要求。太陽能光伏逆變器的BOBS合格評定範圍須直接向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）確認。中國國內審批不能轉移至波札那。在將產品用於任何波札那光伏項目前，請在bera.co.bw核實現行BERA許可門檻、費用和技術條件，並在bobstandards.bw核實BOBS強制性產品範圍。
